column1: # Sweep 39B — Squid: mlr=0.010 + EMBED_BITS=7 (exploit int7 headroom)

#   Intermediate MLR may carry smaller int7 quant penalty than mlr=0.015 (+0.019 seen on h100_final).
#   build_alt (mlr=0.012, int7) achieved 1.36952. mlr=0.010 should be at least competitive.
# ~60 min training + ~20 min eval each. Queue both back-to-back.
